title: Surgeon Vacancy at Cipla Global Group - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at Cipla Global Group - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at Cipla Global Group are looking for an experienced Surgeon based out of Bengaluru. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Cipla Global Group:
Cipla Global Group is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Clinical Research

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Flexible working hours
• Life and accident insurance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Cipla Global Group!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
